name: Atrae, Inc.
summary: Atrae, Inc. plans, develops, and manages job information Websites in Japan. It operates Green, a job site that provides a proposal of job offers to job seekers and talents to companies; yenta, a matching app that connects business professionals utilizing AI technology; and wevox, an engagement analysis tool, as well as provides stress check test services. Atrae, Inc. was founded in 2003 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.
